name: Ciprofloxacin
description: Kwayoyin Fluoroquinolone tare da faffadan gram-korau. Ana amfani da shi don cututtukan raunuka masu tsanani, shiga cikin rauni na ciki (GI flora cover), da cututtukan urinary tract. Akwai PO da IV.
warnings: Haɗarin tsagewar jijiyoyi, musamman tendon Achilles. Kashe idan ciwon tsoka ya tasowa.
Yana iya tsawaita tazarar QT -- taka tsantsan tare da wasu magunguna masu tsawaita QT.
Guji a cikin ciki idan akwai madadin.

pediatric.dose: 10-20 mg/kg IV q8-12h (max 400 mg/dose). PO: 10-20 mg/kg q12h (max 750 mg/dose).
pediatric.note: Yi amfani da shi kawai lokacin da fa'idodin ya zarce haɗarin tendinopathy. Ajiye don cututtuka masu tsanani.

obstetric.note: Guji a cikin ciki idan akwai madadin. Yi amfani kawai don cututtuka masu barazana ga rayuwa inda fa'ida ta fi haɗari.

source: JTS CPG: Wound Care / Infectious Disease
